---
name: Enhancement
about: Suggest an improvement to an existing feature or system
title: "[ENHANCEMENT]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Summary
Describe the improvement clearly.

## Current Behavior
How does the current system work?

## Problem
What feels unclear, weak, or missing right now?

## Suggested Improvement
What should be changed or improved?

## Purpose
Why would this improve the experience?

## Additional Info
Optional screenshots, examples, or extra context.
